channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Tubi TV Licenses Yokoso Scooby-Doo! 动画 by OLM
item.description: Itsurō Kawasaki directs series set in Japan ― Tubi TV announced on Monday that it has licensed Yokoso Scooby-Doo!, a new anime in the Scooby-Doo mystery comedy franchise. Warner Bros. Animation is... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Tubi TV Licenses Yokoso Scooby-Doo! Anime by OLM

item.title: [动画][剧场版][PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network You, Fireworks, Our Promise 动画 Film的 预告PV 公开 More 声优阵容 & 制作阵容, Theme Song
item.description: timelesz performs theme song "Kienai Hanabi" ― The staff for the anime film of Kaori Mado's You, Fireworks, and Our Promise (Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to or Kimi-Hana for short) novel series... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'You, Fireworks, and Our Promise' Anime Film's Trailer Unveils More Cast & Staff, Theme Song

item.title: Anime News Network WEBTOON, Warner Bros. Animation Unveil 4 New Animated Titles in Expanding IP Partnership
item.description: The Wolf & Red Riding Hood, Vampire Family, Sable Curse, Snow and Briar to get animated adaptations ― WEBTOON Entertainment and Warner Bros. Animation announced on Wednesday four additional animated... | 来源: ANN | 原文: WEBTOON, Warner Bros. Animation Unveil 4 New Animated Titles in Expanding IP Partnership

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Kirio Fan Club 动画 Casts Yōko Hikasa, Yui Kanari, Yū Serizawa
item.description: Additional cast to appear in 8th episode on Thursday ― The official website for the anime of Chikyu no Sakana Ponchan's Kirio Fan Club manga revealed three additional cast members on Monday. Yōko... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Kirio Fan Club Anime Casts Yōko Hikasa, Yui Kanari, Yū Serizawa
